query_normalized: llmxive follow-up: extending "role-agent: bootstrapping llm agents via dual-role evolution" computer science
rationale: The paper focuses on the taxonomy, risks, and governance of AI deception (a safety and ethics topic), whereas the user's question concerns a specific technical methodology for bootstrapping LLM agents via dual-role evolution. There is no overlap in the mechanism, variables, or empirical setting between studying deceptive behaviors and the agent evolution framework described in the user's title, and the paper does not serve as a foundational reference for the "Role-Agent" technique.
